title: created this free 300 tools airtable with tools that help with growth workflows
raw_text: Created this free 300+ Tools Airtable with tools that help with growth + workflows :) - Indie Hackers Home Starting Up Case Studies DB Products Ideas DB Vibe Coding Tools Subscribe to IH+ Starting Up Case Studies Ideas DB Products DB Join 17 Likes 0 Bookmarks 19 Comments Report Created this free 300+ Tools Airtable with tools that help with growth + workflows :) by Dan Siepen At my startup Cenario we have been exploring tools and workflows that work well for our business and was amazing to discover so many various tools I’ve personally never heard of. We started collating it all into a spreadsheet and organising by category + price. We’ve been working on this for some time and realised it would be awesome to share with the wider community 😊 So, you can have this data for FREE! ❤️ We’ve added some extra data including; 👉Name 👉Price 👉Description 👉Category 👉Website 👉Tag Check it out free here: https://bit.ly/2yP9QQm Dan Siepen posted to Growth on April 28, 2020 17 0 Share Say something nice to dansiepen… Post Comment 2 Very great list One question though: how can I add Kingmailer.co on that list?
